commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
# TrueNAS SCALE — Custom App compose file.
# Image is public — no registry credentials needed.
#
# To update to a new version: re-deploy the app in TrueNAS UI (pulls fresh :latest)

services:
  fingerprint-registry:
    image: ghcr.io/imperator71/garage-fingerprint-registry:latest
    ports:
      - "30080:8080"
    environment:
      - MQTT_URL=mqtt://192.168.1.1
      - MQTT_USER=
      - MQTT_PASS=
      - PORT=8080
      - DATA_FILE=/data/templates.json
    volumes:
      - ./data:/data
    restart: unless-stopped
